news.title: Google Cloud to Host its Latest AI Models in India: Thomas Kurian
news.description: [THE ECONOMIC TIMES] Google Cloud is making its latest artificial intelligence (AI) models available locally in India in a big data sovereignty push, chief executive Thomas Kurian told Surabhi Agarwal in a video interview.
